sentences.target: Meine Chefin ist heute im Büro.

translations.de: Meine Chefin ist heute im Büro.
translations.en: My boss is in the office today.
translations.es: Mi jefa está en la oficina hoy.
translations.fr: Ma cheffe est au bureau aujourd'hui.
translations.it: La mia capo è in ufficio oggi.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的女上司今天在办公室。
translations.yue: 我個女上司今日喺辦公室。
translations.pt: Minha chefe está no escritório hoje.
translations.vi: Hôm nay sếp của tôi ở văn phòng.
translations.nl: Mijn baas is vandaag op kantoor.
translations.hu: A főnököm ma az irodában van.
translations.hi: मेरी बॉस आज दफ़्तर में हैं।
translations.pl: Moja szefowa jest dziś w biurze.
translations.el: Η προϊσταμένη μου είναι σήμερα στο γραφείο.
translations.nb: Sjefen min er på kontoret i dag.
translations.id: Hari ini bos saya ada di kantor.
translations.sv: Min chef är på kontoret idag.
translations.ro: Șefa mea este la birou astăzi.
translations.cs: Moje šéfová je dnes v kanceláři.
translations.da: Min chef er på kontoret i dag.
translations.ja: 今日は上司がオフィスにいます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying 'Chefin'; marks 1st person singular possessor; forms the subject NP in nominative.
Head noun of the subject NP; feminine nominative singular.
Finite copular auxiliary (3rd person singular, present); links the subject to the predicate.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause.
Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition introducing a locative PP and governing dative.
Object of the preposition 'im'; neuter dative singular; locative complement.

sentences.target: Ich schreibe der Chefin später eine Nachricht.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈʃʁaɪ̯bə deːɐ̯ ˈʃeːfɪn ˈʃpɛːtɐ ˈaɪ̯nə ˈnaːxʁɪçt/

translations.de: Ich schreibe der Chefin später eine Nachricht.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈʃʁaɪ̯bə deːɐ̯ ˈʃeːfɪn ˈʃpɛːtɐ ˈaɪ̯nə ˈnaːxʁɪçt/
translations.en: I’ll write the boss a message later.
translations.es: Más tarde le escribiré un mensaje a mi jefa.
translations.fr: J'enverrai un message à ma cheffe plus tard.
translations.it: Più tardi scriverò un messaggio alla mia capo.
translations.zh-Hans: 我稍后给女上司发个消息。
translations.yue: 我遲啲會發訊息畀我個女上司。
translations.pt: Mais tarde vou mandar uma mensagem para a minha chefe.
translations.he: אשלח למנהלת שלי הודעה מאוחר יותר.
translations.vi: Lát nữa tôi sẽ nhắn tin cho sếp của tôi.
translations.nl: Later stuur ik mijn baas een bericht.
translations.hi: मैं बाद में अपनी बॉस को एक संदेश लिखूँगा।
translations.el: Αργότερα θα στείλω μήνυμα στην προϊσταμένη μου.
translations.nb: Senere sender jeg sjefen min en melding.
translations.id: Nanti saya akan kirim pesan ke bos saya.
translations.sv: Senare ska jag skicka ett meddelande till min chef.
translations.ro: Mai târziu îi voi trimite șefei mele un mesaj.
translations.da: Senere sender jeg min chef en besked.
translations.ja: 後で上司にメッセージを送ります。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; subject in nominative singular.
Finite main verb (1st person singular, present).
Definite article; dative feminine singular with 'Chefin' (indirect object).
Head of the indirect object NP in dative.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause.
Indefinite article; accusative feminine singular with 'Nachricht' (direct object).
Direct object NP in accusative.

sentences.target: Ich frage die Chefin nach dem Plan.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈfʁaːɡə diː ˈʃeːfɪn naːx deːm plaːn/

translations.de: Ich frage die Chefin nach dem Plan.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈfʁaːɡə diː ˈʃeːfɪn naːx deːm plaːn/
translations.en: I’m asking the boss about the plan.
translations.es: Le pregunto a mi jefa sobre el plan.
translations.fr: Je demande à ma cheffe quel est le plan.
translations.it: Chiedo alla mia capo qual è il piano.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在问女上司关于计划的事。
translations.yue: 我問我個女上司關於個計劃。
translations.pt: Estou perguntando para a minha chefe sobre o plano.
translations.he: אני שואל את המנהלת על התוכנית.
translations.vi: Tôi đang hỏi sếp về kế hoạch.
translations.nl: Ik vraag mijn baas naar het plan.
translations.hi: मैं अपनी बॉस से योजना के बारे में पूछ रहा हूँ।
translations.el: Ρωτάω την προϊσταμένη μου για το σχέδιο.
translations.nb: Jeg spør sjefen min om planen.
translations.id: Saya sedang bertanya kepada bos saya tentang rencana.
translations.sv: Jag frågar min chef om planen.
translations.da: Jeg spørger min chef om planen.
translations.ja: 計画について上司に聞いています。

tokens.explanation: Subject in nominative singular.
Finite main verb (1st person singular, present).
Definite article; accusative feminine singular with 'Chefin' (direct object).
Head of the direct object NP in accusative.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a PP indicating what is being asked about.
Definite article; dative masculine singular with 'Plan'.
Object of the preposition 'nach' in dative; prepositional complement.

sentences.target: Wir warten auf die Chefin vor dem Raum.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈvaʁtən aʊ̯f diː ˈʃeːfɪn foːɐ̯ deːm ʁaʊ̯m/

translations.de: Wir warten auf die Chefin vor dem Raum.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈvaʁtən aʊ̯f diː ˈʃeːfɪn foːɐ̯ deːm ʁaʊ̯m/
translations.en: We are waiting for the boss outside the room.
translations.es: Estamos esperando a la jefa fuera de la sala.
translations.fr: Nous attendons la cheffe devant la salle.
translations.it: Aspettiamo la capo fuori dalla sala.
translations.ko: 우리는 방 밖에서 팀장님을 기다리고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在房间外等女上司。
translations.yue: 我哋喺房外面等女上司。
translations.pt: Estamos esperando a chefe do lado de fora da sala.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang đợi sếp ở ngoài phòng.
translations.nl: We wachten buiten de kamer op de baas.
translations.uk: Ми чекаємо на начальницю перед кімнатою.
translations.hu: A szoba előtt várjuk a főnököt.
translations.hi: हम कमरे के बाहर बॉस का इंतज़ार कर रहे हैं।
translations.el: Περιμένουμε την προϊσταμένη έξω από την αίθουσα.
translations.nb: Vi venter på sjefen utenfor rommet.
translations.id: Kami menunggu bos di luar ruangan.
translations.sv: Vi väntar på chefen utanför rummet.
translations.da: Vi venter på chefen udenfor rummet.
translations.ja: 私たちは部屋の外で上司を待っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; subject in nominative plural.
Finite main verb (1st person plural, present); requires 'auf' + accusative complement.
Preposition; here with accusative, introducing the object of waiting.
Definite article; accusative feminine singular with 'Chefin'.
Object of the preposition 'auf' in accusative.
Locative preposition governing dative; introduces a place PP.
Definite article; dative masculine singular with 'Raum'.
Object of the preposition 'vor' in dative; locative complement.
